Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Modern Illustration: Archive of illustration from c.1950-1975 44 upvotes, 4 comments
  2. Sea level much higher than assumed in most coastal hazard assessments 22 upvotes, 1 comments
  3. Show HN: Stacked Game of Life 129 upvotes, 24 comments
  4. Elevator Saga: The elevator programming game (2015) 68 upvotes, 13 comments
  5. A Visual Guide to DNA Sequencing 25 upvotes, 3 comments
  6. Libre Solar – Open Hardware for Renewable Energy 92 upvotes, 22 comments
  7. MyFirst Kids Watch Hacked. Access to Camera and Microphone 36 upvotes, 6 comments
  8. Qwen3.5 Fine-Tuning Guide – Unsloth Documentation 127 upvotes, 37 comments
  9. Motorola GrapheneOS devices will be bootloader unlockable/relockable 1089 upvotes, 436 comments
  10. Something is afoot in the land of Qwen 135 upvotes, 45 comments
  11. RE#: how we built the fastest regex engine in F# 146 upvotes, 53 comments
  12. Medical journal says the case reports it has published for 25 years are fiction 87 upvotes, 31 comments
  13. “It turns out” (2010) 138 upvotes, 55 comments
  14. RFC 9849. TLS Encrypted Client Hello 210 upvotes, 100 comments
  15. Better JIT for Postgres 122 upvotes, 54 comments
  16. Toxic combinations: when small signals add up to a security incident 13 upvotes, 2 comments
  17. A CPU that runs entirely on GPU 193 upvotes, 96 comments
  18. Nobody Gets Promoted for Simplicity 547 upvotes, 313 comments
  19. Agentic Engineering Patterns 363 upvotes, 203 comments
  20. Government grant-funded research should not be published in for-profit journals 177 upvotes, 95 comments
  21. Glaze by Raycast 128 upvotes, 72 comments
  22. Bet on German Train Delays 250 upvotes, 166 comments
  23. Chimpanzees Are into Crystals 64 upvotes, 40 comments
  24. Emails to Outlook.com rejected due to a fault or overzealous blocking rules 66 upvotes, 43 comments
  25. Greg Knauss Is Losing Himself 48 upvotes, 31 comments
  26. TikTok will not introduce end-to-end encryption, saying it makes users less safe 315 upvotes, 312 comments
  27. Welcome to the Wasteland: A Thousand Gas Towns 24 upvotes, 17 comments
  28. MacBook Neo 591 upvotes, 922 comments
  29. SRGB↔XYZ Conversion (2021) 5 upvotes, 3 comments
  30. Jiga (YC W21) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 1:30am, 5 March 2026. Source here.
